chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Application No.S- 223 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. Mr. Sikandar Ali Junejo, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy P.G for the State. Date of Hearing & Order: 27-11-2023 O R D E R I have gone through the impugned order with the assistance of learned counsel for the applicant as well as learned Deputy P.G. Learned II-Additional Sessions Judge/ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Ghotki. In the order, learned Judge has not cited any reason for declining application seeking directions for registration of FIR, except undertaking a lengthy discussion, which insofar as facts of this case are concerned, is irrelevant. Learned Deputy P.G has conceded that the order is lengthy but sans any meaningful reason. Hence, impugned order is set aside and the case is remanded back to learned II- Additional Sessions Judge, Ghotki to re-hear the parties and decide the same through a speaking order within 15-days. This Crl. Misc. Application is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE Ahmad
